# Benchmark Return Mechanics Audit

Research only. Trading impact: none. Production validated: false.

## Mechanics

- Aggregation: mean_by_rebalance_date_for_return_and_exposure
- Return unit inference: decimal_simple_returns
- Transaction costs: cost = abs(exposure - previous_exposure) * bps / 10000; applied once per aggregated rebalance date
- Turnover: cumulative absolute exposure change, not annualized
- Meta holdout rows: 966
- Meta holdout rebalance dates: 104

## Champion Baseline

- Equals always_full_exposure: True
- Champion config: configs/champions/ranked_top5_monthly_exposure90_v1.yaml
- Represents full YAML replay: False
- Note: The frozen champion YAML has target exposure/rebalance mechanics, but the allocation diagnostic baseline is constant 1.0 exposure, so it has zero exposure turnover in this report.

## Leakage Check

- Optimizer protocol: out_of_fold_random_search_then_frozen_holdout_evaluation
- Out-of-fold optimizer selection: True
- Actual columns used as forecasts: []

## Red Flags

- always_full_exposure:period_return_above_50pct
- binary_exposure_overlay:period_return_above_50pct
- champion_baseline:period_return_above_50pct
- champion_baseline_is_full_exposure_diagnostic_not_yaml_replay
- meta_ensemble_allocation:period_return_above_50pct
- return_only_allocation:period_return_above_50pct
